calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Ryan Dahm of the Cook Collection Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-989-4730 appearing for
the Plaintiff;
Atty. John H. Douglas of Douglas Law Offices, Tel. No. 1-415-794-4751 appearing for the Defendant.


RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Richard Gregory's motion to set aside default and vacate judgment is taken under submission. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/ru

* * * After hearing the court issued an order adopting the tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant Richard Gregory's motion to set aside default and vacate judgment GRANTED under CCP 473.5. The longstanding policy in California's courts is to decide controversies on their merits. (Berman v. Klassman (1971) 17 Cal.App.3d 900, 909.). * * * *

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576. Telephone: 530-339-5023.

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Quixey, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Richard Gregory, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on October 16, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 26, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance requirement at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 29, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Quixey, Inc. a Delaware corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Richard Gregory, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $33,507.02.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,184.84.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $510.00.
Total - $37,201.86.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
